name: destroy_item
asm:
0x1400015BC      PUSH     RBP
  0x1400015BD      MOV      RBP, RSP
  0x1400015C0      SUB      RSP, 0x20
  0x1400015C4      MOV      qword ptr [RBP + 0x10], RCX
  0x1400015C8      CMP      qword ptr [RBP + 0x10], 0x0
  0x1400015CD      JZ       0x1400015db
  0x1400015CF      MOV      RAX, qword ptr [RBP + 0x10]
  0x1400015D3      MOV      RCX, RAX
  0x1400015D6      CALL     0x140002b60
  0x1400015DB      NOP      
  0x1400015DC      ADD      RSP, 0x20
  0x1400015E0      POP      RBP
  0x1400015E1      RET
